summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nexline corporate landing page contact form with email integration. Backend APIs, form submission, and data persistence are working perfectly. Critical issue found with Resend API key causing email delivery failures.

critical_bugs.issue: Resend API key invalid - emails failing with 'API key is invalid' error
critical_bugs.impact: No email notifications sent to admin (shahid@nexlinetrading.com) or clients

resolved_issues.resolution: Moved logger configuration to top of file

passed_tests: API health check and basic endpoints
Form validation for required fields and email format
Successful quotation submission with valid data
Data persistence to MongoDB quotation_requests collection
Complete frontend form functionality with 7 fields
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Resend API key (re_iKwcbZLq_JLWLMwwqb3m5qNUU7dFmBGWe) is invalid. Email notifications to admin and clients are failing. Please verify and update with correct Resend API key.

success_percentage.backend: 85% - All APIs working but email integration failing
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All form functionality and integration working perfectly
